title: Miconia fissinervia
taxonomy: Miconia fissinervia is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. This family consists of approximately 150 genera and over 5,000 species of plants. The Melastomataceae family is part of the order Myrtales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Myrtaceae and Lythraceae. Miconia fissinervia is classified as a member of the genus Miconia, which comprises around 1,000 species of plants. The species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
